title: Old Name Tags
description: Reverts the 1.21.2 changes to name tag rendering
body:
# Description
Reverts the 1.21.2 changes to name tag rendering. Name tags are less visible through blocks like in 1.21.1 or below.

# Why?
In 1.21.2 name tags render much more visible when the entity is hidden behind blocks. This looks like some kind of cheat, that's why this mod reverts this.
